title: Kuehne+Nagel India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kuehne+Nagel India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
